title: Understanding the Lifetime ISA: Non-holder quantitative research
body: "HM Revenue and Customs (HMRC) commissioned research agency Ipsos to undertake quantitative research with those who were eligible to open a Lifetime Individual Savings Account (LISA) but had not opened one.  The overall aim of this research was to provide a deeper understanding of non-LISA holders’ demographics, their knowledge and awareness of the LISA, why they had not opened a LISA and their future motivations to open one.  Between 6 and 12 February 2025, Ipsos conducted a total of 1,066 online surveys with eligible non-LISA holders  The views in this report are the authors’ own and do not necessarily reflect those of HMRC.  "
